task_type.description: The type of the inference task that the model will perform.

deepseek_inference_id.description: The unique identifier of the inference endpoint.

timeout.description: Specifies the amount of time to wait for the inference endpoint to be created.

service.description: The type of service supported for the specified task type. In this case, `deepseek`.

api_key.description: A valid API key for your DeepSeek account. You can find or create your DeepSeek API keys on the DeepSeek API key page. IMPORTANT: You need to provide the API key only once, during the inference model creation. The get inference endpoint API does not retrieve your API key.

model_id.description: For a `completion` or `chat_completion` task, the name of the model to use for the inference task. For the available `completion` and `chat_completion` models, refer to the [DeepSeek Models & Pricing docs](https://api-docs.deepseek.com/quick_start/pricing).

url.description: The URL endpoint to use for the requests. Defaults to `https://api.deepseek.com/chat/completions`.

service_settings.description: Settings used to install the inference model. These settings are specific to the `deepseek` service.

api_key.description: A valid API key for your DeepSeek account. You can find or create your DeepSeek API keys on the DeepSeek API key page. IMPORTANT: You need to provide the API key only once, during the inference model creation. The get inference endpoint API does not retrieve your API key.

model_id.description: For a `completion` or `chat_completion` task, the name of the model to use for the inference task. For the available `completion` and `chat_completion` models, refer to the [DeepSeek Models & Pricing docs](https://api-docs.deepseek.com/quick_start/pricing).

url.description: The URL endpoint to use for the requests. Defaults to `https://api.deepseek.com/chat/completions`.
